title: Arsenal (RPG Series)
description: Legendary weapons from the past - not crafted, but conquered.
body:
![Arsenal title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LiP9Q3KV/images/4ee8341d88d80f7b3f8b4be4988ee42207679de9.png "")

## 🗡️ Legendary weapons from the past - not crafted, but conquered.

[![Modloader](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-Fabric%20|%20NeoForge-ecebe6?labelColor=263768&style=for-the-badge)](https://fabricmc.net/)
[![SpellEngine](https://img.shields.io/badge/Ecosystem-Spell_Engine-orange?style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/spell-engine)

## ✨ Discover more of the RPG Series

[![Archers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XIpMGI6r/images/cd19a95a79f1157b33f31818aa615a280b206912.png "Archers")](https://modrinth.com/mod/archers "")
[![Paladins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XIpMGI6r/images/3f19359bfd7521ba17bec818f125e87e09ef277e.png "Paladins")](https://modrinth.com/mod/paladins-and-priests "")
[![Wizards](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XIpMGI6r/images/a7da965aa108daf95c10448c01423be49ce2338d.png "Wizards")](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards "")
[![Jewelry](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XIpMGI6r/images/747102d582732b8defa50a2c925c7d5a6f87d009.png "Jewelry")](https://modrinth.com/mod/jewelry "")
[![Rogues](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XIpMGI6r/images/278d8c941af6dc763cf714b9f36f8b8366a60eb9.png "Rogues")](https://modrinth.com/mod/rogues-and-warriors "")
[![Relics](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XIpMGI6r/images/a62c4eb9400d2ee8349078125ba0ab8b22c4424e.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/relics-rpg "Relics")

# 📦 Installation

### Required

- [Spell Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/spell-engine "")
 

# 🗡️ Features

### 40+ Epic weapons, of 15 different types

- All of them have at least one passive spell built in
- Art style following the footsteps of Minecraft Dungeons
- Content inspired World of Warcraft classics

![sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LiP9Q3KV/images/db94f2b64069754e050b4cefef248ea8faa0cf0c.gif)
![hammer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LiP9Q3KV/images/97796ebcea459b2d35e1781a6c9e4e719d1ba5ed.gif)
![staff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LiP9Q3KV/images/d68178ec9d4bd5a21b763f1baa5d94980fb40a74.gif)

![shield](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LiP9Q3KV/images/831a34dd5758e37d0b1bb28632e4a0267b2c6d8d.gif)
![bow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LiP9Q3KV/images/d7e2f2a0bbea4d84f495a52d71e13b155db51ede.gif)
![staff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LiP9Q3KV/images/ca402044a39a82afba4c8eea9329f4a3fb5b828e.gif)

![Radiance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LiP9Q3KV/images/d643dd17e3ccbd04773d1fa21b9bc8b0fe270654.png)

### 20+ Passive spells

- Mechanics inspired by Minecraft Dungeons (some of them are exact replicas: Swirling, Shockwave, Radiance….)
- Spells for all archetypes (melee spells, bow spells, magic damage spells…)

![Apolyon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LiP9Q3KV/images/70e34ea4bdc343c47bce61265a8390c0c3314534.png)

![Staff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LiP9Q3KV/images/4b1bb10cd7676aa94d32c45dbf40fe0b2acdfab7.png)

![Crossbow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LiP9Q3KV/images/b8d4b153910dd8b2701a23e122b803cebc5e9d8c.png)

### Obtainable as loot only

- Dropped by bosses (Ender Dragon, Wither, Warden, and third party mod bosses)
- Contained in end game dungeon chests (such as End city chest)

Loot table injections are configurable in `config/rpg_series/loot_items.json`. Arsenal weapons are listed under tier 5 weapons tag.

![dragon drop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LiP9Q3KV/images/97f3e32d7661d99ee4a5ad4cba9e3f60e0b7b918.png)
